center.name: 阿雷基帕大区
center.summary: 阿雷基帕大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括紫领蜂鸟、多色苇霸鹟、Black-fronted ground tyrant等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: peruviana: Andes of western and southern Peru from Ancash to Arequipa and Puno departments, and into Bolivia as far as La Paz Department The Andean tit-spinetail generally inhabits semi-arid to arid montane scrublands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Peru primarily in Arequipa and Puno departments and very rarely as far north as Ancash Department.{{cite book | last =Schulenberg | first =T.S

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: latistriata occurs in the south-central departments of Huancavelica, Ayacucho, and Arequipa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in most of the length of western Peru, between Piura and Arquipa departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of purple-collared woodstar is found in western and southern Ecuador and western Peru all the way south to Arequipa Department
